message:
feat: adversarial witness corpus and regression generator (asupersync-3cddg.12.13)

25 adversarial witnesses across 6 families plus 4 fuzz-based regression generators:
- WF-TIE (3): join left-bias, severity commutativity, exhaustive 4x4 matrix
- WF-ABS (3): panicked absorbs all, ok is identity, strict severity order
- WF-RACE (4): loser drain, simultaneous completion, commutativity, multi-participant
- WF-OBL (4): all kinds resolve, leak detection, abort during cancel, mixed resolve
- WF-MASK (4): strengthen idempotence/monotonicity, kind severity bounds, propagation
- WF-XADR (3): timeout+join composition, no-unsafe-in-cx scan, seed equivalence
- WF-FUZZ (4): baseline, two-task, corpus round-trip, deterministic campaign

Each witness maps to canonical rule IDs (#1-47) and uses stable seeds for
reproducibility. Covers all acceptance criteria: high-risk families, deterministic
vectors, rule-ID mapping, review metadata in doc comments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
